title: get_creator_profile_with_valid_authentication
description: Test the GET /api/creator/profile endpoint with a valid Authorization token to ensure it returns the creator's profile and storefront configuration successfully with a 200 status code.

title: patch_creator_profile_with_valid_payload_and_authentication
description: Test the PATCH /api/creator/profile endpoint with a valid Authorization token and a well-formed payload containing theme and blocksLayout to verify successful update of the creator's storefront layout and theme settings, returning a 200 status code.

title: get_products_list_with_valid_authentication
description: Test the GET /api/products endpoint with a valid Authorization token to ensure it returns a list of products for the authenticated creator with a 200 status code.

title: post_create_product_with_valid_payload_and_authentication
description: Test the POST /api/products endpoint with a valid Authorization token and a valid product payload including name, description, price, productType, thumbnailKey, fileKey, and isPublished to verify successful product creation with a 201 status code.

title: get_orders_list_with_valid_authentication
description: Test the GET /api/orders endpoint with a valid Authorization token to ensure it returns a list of orders for the authenticated creator with a 200 status code.

title: get_oembed_data_with_valid_platform_and_url
description: Test the GET /api/storefront/oembed endpoint with valid platform and url query parameters to verify it returns the correct oEmbed metadata with a 200 status code.

title: get_admin_announcements_with_valid_admin_authentication
description: Test the GET /api/admin/announcements endpoint with a valid admin Authorization token to ensure it returns a list of system announcements with a 200 status code.
